description: Backend implementation for all 10 resident quality-of-life features: database migration (013), controllers, and route registration. Covers: Personal Music Therapy, Personal Menu Choice System, Friendship Mapper, Daily Purpose Planner, Mood-Responsive Environment, Digital Photo Frame Feed, Sleep Quality Tracker, Intergenerational Programme Manager, Rehabilitation Goal Tracker, and Birthday & Celebration Planner.
steps: Create backend/migrations/013_quality_of_life.sql with tables for all 10 features: (1) music_genres, music_preferences, music_sessions, music_session_songs with mood_before/mood_after and effectiveness tracking; (2) menu_options, menu_dietary_profiles, menu_choices with photo_url, texture requirements, cultural/religious needs; (3) friendship_observations, friendship_connections with resident_a/resident_b and strength scoring, seating_suggestions; (4) purpose_roles, purpose_role_assignments, purpose_engagement_logs with satisfaction tracking; (5) mood_interventions, mood_intervention_history with before/after scores and effectiveness; (6) photo_frame_photos with approval workflow (pending/approved/rejected), scheduling fields (show_on_date), viewing_history; (7) sleep_logs with bedtime, wake_time, disturbances count, disturbance_types (JSONB), interventions, quality_rating, sleep_profiles; (8) intergenerational_programmes, intergenerational_visits, intergenerational_participants with safeguarding fields, engagement/wellbeing scoring; (9) rehab_goals, rehab_milestones, rehab_progress_logs with celebration and family notification flags; (10) celebrations, celebration_tasks, celebration_calendar with auto-detection fields for birthdays, anniversaries, religious festivals. All tables must include care_home_id FK, UUID PKs, created_at timestamps, and appropriate indexes.

Create backend/src/controllers/musicTherapy.controller.ts with functions: getGenreLibrary, getResidentPreferences, updateResidentPreferences, startSession, endSession (logs mood_after), getSessionHistory, getEffectivenessReport. Follow the pattern in diabetes.controller.ts using query() and req.user!.care_home_id.

Create backend/src/controllers/menuChoice.controller.ts with functions: listMenuOptions, createMenuOption, getResidentDietaryProfile, updateResidentDietaryProfile, submitMenuChoice, getKitchenDashboard (aggregated choices by meal), getResidentChoices.

Create backend/src/controllers/friendshipMapper.controller.ts with functions: recordObservation, getResidentConnections, getNetworkGraph (all connections for care home), getSeatingSuggestions, getIsolatedResidents.
Create backend/src/controllers/purposePlanner.controller.ts with functions: listRoles, createRole, assignRole, getResidentRoles, logEngagement, getEngagementReport, suggestNewRoles.

Create backend/src/controllers/moodEnvironment.controller.ts with functions: getInterventionSuggestions (queries what worked before for this resident based on mood_intervention_history effectiveness scores), recordIntervention, getInterventionHistory, getEffectivenessReport.

Create backend/src/controllers/photoFrame.controller.ts with functions: uploadPhoto (family upload), listPhotos (with approval status filter), approvePhoto, rejectPhoto, schedulePhoto, getViewingHistory, logView.
Create backend/src/controllers/sleepTracker.controller.ts with functions: logSleep, getSleepHistory, getSleepProfile (trend analysis over last 30 days), getDisturbancePatterns, getSleepSuggestions.

Create backend/src/controllers/intergenerational.controller.ts with functions: createProgramme, listProgrammes, createVisit, listVisits, addParticipant, logOutcome, getSafeguardingRequirements, getWellbeingImpact.
Create backend/src/controllers/rehabGoals.controller.ts with functions: createGoal, getResidentGoals, addMilestone, updateMilestoneProgress, logProgress, celebrateAchievement, getProgressReport.

Create backend/src/controllers/celebrations.controller.ts with functions: getUpcoming (auto-detect birthdays from residents.date_of_birth, admission anniversaries from residents.admission_date), createCelebration, assignTask, completeTask, getCelebrationCalendar, notifyFamily.

Register all new controller routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts following the existing pattern: import each controller at the top, add route groups after the palliative care routes section. Use isStaff for read operations and isManager for create/update where appropriate. Music therapy, menu choices, sleep tracking, and mood environment routes should use isStaff. Friendship mapper management, purpose planner management, photo frame approval, intergenerational programme management, rehab goals, and celebrations should use isClinical or isManager as appropriate.
acceptance_criteria: backend/migrations/013_quality_of_life.sql exists with CREATE TABLE statements for all required tables with proper constraints, indexes, and foreign keys
All 10 controller files exist in backend/src/controllers/ with proper TypeScript, query() usage, and multi-tenancy via care_home_id
backend/src/routes/index.ts imports all 10 new controllers and registers routes for each
Running 'cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build' succeeds without TypeScript errors
findings: Build has 14 pre-existing TypeScript errors (auth.controller.ts jwt types, photos.controller.ts multer req.file, compression/multer missing @types declarations). These exist on the base branch without any of our changes. Our new code introduces zero additional errors.
